Applies mathematical flow fields (attractors/noise) for organic movement.

Maximum 3D distance between particles to form a link.

2.0

Thickness of connecting lines in screen-space pixels.

1.5

HDR glow intensity driving post-processing bloom.

Appearance & Filters

0.85
0.00

Filters out darker pixels. Ideal for isolated shapes or black backdrops.

Post-Processing & Optics

0.5

Premium optical glow effect. Disable (0.0) for better performance.
